message:
feat(conformance): re-capture fixtures from JAX 0.9.2 and fix PRNG key extraction

Update capture_legacy_fixtures.py to handle JAX 0.9+ typed PRNG keys
via jax.random.key_data() fallback in _as_u32_list(), fixing TypeError
on direct numpy conversion.

Re-capture all RNG and transform fixtures from JAX 0.9.2 in strict
mode. Key changes: capture_mode updated from analytical_fallback to
legacy_jax, RNG fold_in/split key bits updated for new PRNG key
implementation, uniform/normal tolerances widened to 1e-6 to account
for JAX 0.9 precision changes, and several f64 expected values gain
one digit of precision.

Update FEATURE_PARITY.md: mark conformance harness and legacy fixture
capture as parity_green, document 611 transform + 25 RNG fixtures
from JAX 0.9.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
